summary: Make the workbench command history authoritative for editor and parameter undo/redo without duplicate mutation entries.

decisions.topic: Single authoritative undo and redo path
decisions.decision: Keep reversible before/after frames private to the workbench runtime, leave the public session-history schema as metadata, route keyboard and menu undo/redo through runtime commands, and suppress CodeMirror's separate document undo stack.
decisions.rationale: The prior editor-local path could mutate the source and separately record the command invocation, producing two history entries and leaving parameter mutations marked undoable without executable inverses. Runtime-owned frames provide one chronological source of truth while preserving the Appendix B history representation.

testEvidence.criterion: A scripted sequence of document edits, single and multi-parameter changes, and writing parameter values into source must produce one entry per mutation; undo must restore every prior state and redo every forward state without appending history.
testEvidence.test: Run the focused runtime and live Workbench integration tests, then strict TypeScript and scoped Biome checks.

red.outcome: RED: 3/24 tests failed. The runtime rejected history-undo as unhandled, Ctrl+Z left cube(11) unchanged, and the scripted state sequence could not reverse.

green.command: pnpm.cmd exec biome check src/application/runtime/workbench-runtime-contracts.ts src/application/runtime/workbench-runtime.ts src/ui/editor/editor-command-execution.ts src/ui/editor/use-editor-command-coordinator.ts src/ui/editor/CodeEditor.tsx tests/application/runtime/workbench-runtime-history.test.ts tests/ui/Workbench.test.tsx tests/ui/Workbench.editor-settings.test.tsx; pnpm.cmd exec tsc --noEmit; pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/application/runtime/workbench-runtime-history.test.ts tests/ui/Workbench.test.tsx tests/ui/Workbench.editor-settings.test.tsx tests/ui/editor/CodeEditor.language.test.tsx; pnpm.cmd exec biome check src/application/runtime/workbench-runtime.ts tests/ui/editor/CodeEditor.language.test.tsx; pnpm.cmd exec vitest run tests/application/runtime/workbench-runtime-history.test.ts tests/ui/editor/CodeEditor.language.test.tsx
green.outcome: GREEN: scoped Biome and TypeScript passed; after adversarial corrections, the integrated focused set passed 4 files/42 tests. Evidence includes exact revision alignment after each forward/undo/redo state, a source-replacement undo barrier, synchronous subscriber undo at history publication, retained preview quality for write-values replay, and CodeMirror undoDepth exactly zero after a source mutation. Independent re-review returned literal 0/0/0/0/0 for the vertical.

nearMisses.sought: Adversarial review of reversible-frame replay invariants and publication ordering
nearMisses.confirmation: The first green implementation could cross a newer source replacement, restore stale parameter revisions, schedule the wrong replay quality, and publish before installing its inverse. Each issue received a focused regression and the re-review closed at 0/0/0/0/0.

attestation: No prohibited source was consulted in producing this change.
